title: Smoky Canadian Collards Stir-fry
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring smoky collards, perfect for a low-fat-friendly meal with just a few simple ingredients.

ingredients.name: 500g (17oz) collard greens
ingredients.notes: Wash thoroughly and remove hard stems.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil or low-saturated fat substitute
1/4 cup (60ml) low-sodium soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with a blend of balsamic vinegar and honey for sweetness.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp smoked paprika or liquid smoke (optional)

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add collard greens and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are wilted but still retain their shape, about 5-7 minutes.
Toss in garlic and smoked paprika (if using), cooking for another minute or two until fragrant.
Pour in the low-sodium soy sauce and simmer until slightly thickened, about 2-3 minutes. Adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Serve hot as a side dish.
